fields.helpText: The NUMBER field contains the internal entry number of the MHV  SOCIALIZATION record.
This is text representing a possible patient response to the clerk's  encouragement to register in My HealtheVet.
This field contains an integer used to define where this entry will  display in a list, in relation to other entries. A value of 1 displays  before 2, a value of 2 displays before 3, etc.
This is the text representing a possible patient response to the clerk's  encouragement to register in My HealtheVet that is displayed during the  registration process.
This word processing field contains text the clerk reads to the patient  to encourage the patient to register in My HealtheVet.
This field contains MUMPS code to execute after an entry is selected.
